tasks.subject: DAR PDF STATUS column: surface skip reason (parity with markdown `skipped (already_evaluated)`)
tasks.note: From docs/session-reports/2026-07-22-1651-dar-already-evaluated-fill-gate.md §14. PDF STATUS shows only `skipped`; markdown already includes reason. Renderer: winston_v2 DailyActivityReportPdfRenderer status column.

tasks.subject: Optional: zero-signal evaluation marker so quiet days have hard once-per-day DA lock without OperationsTasks
tasks.note: From docs/session-reports/2026-07-22-1651-dar-already-evaluated-fill-gate.md §14. After 2026-07-22 fix, already_evaluated is task-only; empty re-runs re-evaluate fully. Only needed if ops wants strict once-per-day without creating dummy tasks.
